# iosxe_ipv6_dhcp_pool (Resource)

This resource can manage the IPv6 DHCP Pool configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "iosxe_ipv6_dhcp_pool" "example" {
  name                        = "DHCPv6-PD"
  prefix_delegation_pool_name = "DHCPv6-PD"
  dns_servers                 = ["2001:4860:4860::8888"]
  domain_names                = ["example.com"]
  vendor_specifics = [
    {
      enterprise_id = 9
      suboptions = [
        {
          number  = 1
          address = "2001:db8::1"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) DHCP pool name

### Optional

- `address_prefixes` (Attributes List) IPv6 address allocation prefix (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--address_prefixes))
- `bootfile_url` (String) Boot file URL
- `delete_mode` (String) Configure behavior when deleting/destroying the resource. Either delete the entire object (YANG container) being managed, or only delete the individual resource attributes configured explicitly and leave everything else as-is. Default value is `all`.
  - Choices: `all`, `attributes`
- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.
- `dns_servers` (List of String) DNS server addresses
- `domain_names` (List of String) Domain names
- `import_dns_server` (Boolean) Import DNS address from interface
- `import_domain_name` (Boolean) Import domain name from interface
- `information_refresh_days` (Number) Information refresh days
  - Range: `0`-`365`
- `information_refresh_hours` (Number) Information refresh hours
  - Range: `0`-`23`
- `information_refresh_infinite` (Boolean) Infinite information refresh
- `information_refresh_minutes` (Number) Information refresh minutes
  - Range: `0`-`59`
- `link_addresses` (Attributes List) Link-address to match (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--link_addresses))
- `option_include_all` (Boolean) Include all DHCPv6 configured options in REPLY
- `prefix_delegation_pool_name` (String) IPv6 prefix delegation pool name
- `prefix_delegation_pool_preferred_lifetime` (String) Preferred lifetime in seconds or infinite
- `prefix_delegation_pool_valid_lifetime` (String) Valid lifetime in seconds or infinite
- `prefix_delegation_prefixes` (Attributes List) IPv6 prefix delegation prefix (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--prefix_delegation_prefixes))
- `sntp_addresses` (List of String) SNTP server addresses
- `vendor_specifics` (Attributes List) Vendor-specific options (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vendor_specifics))
- `vrf` (String) VRF name

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The path of the object.

<a id="nestedatt--address_prefixes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `address_prefixes`

Required:

- `address` (String) IPv6 prefix address

Optional:

- `preferred_lifetime` (String) Preferred lifetime in seconds or infinite
- `valid_lifetime` (String) Valid lifetime in seconds or infinite


<a id="nestedatt--link_addresses"></a>
### Nested Schema for `link_addresses`

Required:

- `address` (String) IPv6 prefix


<a id="nestedatt--prefix_delegation_prefixes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `prefix_delegation_prefixes`

Required:

- `prefix` (String) IPv6 prefix

Optional:

- `hex_string` (String) DHCPv6 unique identifier (hex)
- `iaid` (String) DHCPv6 IAID (hex)
- `preferred_lifetime` (String) Preferred lifetime in seconds or infinite
- `valid_lifetime` (String) Valid lifetime in seconds or infinite


<a id="nestedatt--vendor_specifics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vendor_specifics`

Required:

- `enterprise_id` (Number) Enterprise ID
  - Range: `1`-`4294967295`

Optional:

- `suboptions` (Attributes List) Vendor-specific suboption (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vendor_specifics--suboptions))

<a id="nestedatt--vendor_specifics--suboptions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vendor_specifics.suboptions`

Required:

- `number` (Number) Suboption number
  - Range: `1`-`65535`

Optional:

- `address` (String) IPv6 address value
- `ascii` (String) ASCII string value
- `hex` (String) Hex string value

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import iosxe_ipv6_dhcp_pool.example "<name>"
```
